subject: Appointment of a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for Ontario
precis: Appointment of Cheryl C.M. Siran of the City of Kenora, in the Province of Ontario, Barrister-at-law, to be a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for Ontario.
